requirements.statement: The enterprise portal must support SAML SSO for all administrator accounts.
requirements.source_quote: The enterprise portal must support SAML SSO for all administrator accounts.

requirements.statement: SAML setup must allow identity provider metadata upload and certificate validation.
requirements.source_quote: SAML setup must allow identity provider metadata upload and certificate validation.

requirements.statement: Admins need bulk user invitation through CSV upload.
requirements.source_quote: Admins need bulk user invitation through CSV upload.

requirements.statement: CSV invitation files must support at least ten thousand rows.
requirements.source_quote: CSV invitation files must support at least ten thousand rows.
constraints: CSV invitation files must support at least ten thousand rows.

requirements.statement: CSV import errors should show row number, field name, and a human readable message.
requirements.source_quote: CSV import errors should show row number, field name, and a human readable message.

requirements.statement: Administrator audit logs must be retained for seven years.
requirements.source_quote: Administrator audit logs must be retained for seven years.

requirements.statement: Audit logs must include actor, action, timestamp, IP address, and affected resource.
requirements.source_quote: Audit logs must include actor, action, timestamp, IP address, and affected resource.

requirements.statement: Admins need a searchable audit log screen in the admin console.
requirements.source_quote: Admins need a searchable audit log screen in the admin console.

requirements.statement: Monthly billing reports must export as CSV and PDF.
requirements.source_quote: Monthly billing reports must export as CSV and PDF.

requirements.statement: Billing exports must include account id, invoice id, tax, credits, and total due.
requirements.source_quote: Billing exports must include account id, invoice id, tax, credits, and total due.

requirements.statement: Billing owners must receive payment method expiration alerts thirty days, seven days, and one day before expiration.
requirements.source_quote: Billing owners must receive payment method expiration alerts thirty days, seven days, and one day before expiration.

requirements.statement: Account admins must manage user roles without contacting support.
requirements.source_quote: Account admins must manage user roles without contacting support.

requirements.statement: The portal must include a read-only auditor role.
requirements.source_quote: The portal must include a read-only auditor role.

requirements.statement: Auditor users must view reports and logs but cannot change account settings.
requirements.source_quote: Auditor users must view reports and logs but cannot change account settings.

requirements.statement: Dashboard pages must load in under two seconds for accounts with up to ten thousand users.
requirements.source_quote: Dashboard pages must load in under two seconds for accounts with up to ten thousand users.
constraints: Dashboard pages must load in under two seconds for accounts with up to ten thousand users.

requirements.statement: User list pages must filter by status, role, and last login date.
requirements.source_quote: User list pages must filter by status, role, and last login date.

requirements.statement: The portal must send notification emails when SSO setup fails.
requirements.source_quote: The portal must send notification emails when SSO setup fails.

requirements.statement: The system must detect suspicious login spikes and alert security admins.
requirements.source_quote: The system must detect suspicious login spikes and alert security admins.

requirements.statement: Daily usage metrics must export to the analytics warehouse.
requirements.source_quote: Daily usage metrics must export to the analytics warehouse.

requirements.statement: Usage metrics must include active users, API calls, storage usage, and workspace count.
requirements.source_quote: Usage metrics must include active users, API calls, storage usage, and workspace count.

requirements.statement: Analytics exports must exclude customer secrets and authentication tokens.
requirements.source_quote: Analytics exports must exclude customer secrets and authentication tokens.

requirements.statement: Analytics records must be pseudonymized before export.
requirements.source_quote: Analytics records must be pseudonymized before export.

requirements.statement: The public API must expose a health endpoint for uptime monitoring.
requirements.source_quote: The public API must expose a health endpoint for uptime monitoring.

requirements.statement: The health endpoint must report database, cache, and queue status.
requirements.source_quote: The health endpoint must report database, cache, and queue status.

requirements.statement: Public API endpoints must have configurable per-contract rate limits.
requirements.source_quote: Public API endpoints must have configurable per-contract rate limits.

requirements.statement: Enterprise customers must configure custom branding.
requirements.source_quote: Enterprise customers must configure custom branding.

requirements.statement: Branding must include logo upload, primary color, and email footer text.
requirements.source_quote: Branding must include logo upload, primary color, and email footer text.

requirements.statement: Customer data deletion requests must complete within thirty days.
requirements.source_quote: Customer data deletion requests must complete within thirty days.
constraints: Customer data deletion requests must complete within thirty days.

requirements.statement: Data deletion must create an immutable evidence record.
requirements.source_quote: Data deletion must create an immutable evidence record.

requirements.statement: The application must support legal hold for selected customer accounts.
requirements.source_quote: The application must support legal hold for selected customer accounts.

requirements.statement: Legal hold must prevent deletion until the hold is removed.
requirements.source_quote: Legal hold must prevent deletion until the hold is removed.

requirements.statement: EU customers must have regional data residency.
requirements.source_quote: EU customers must have regional data residency.

requirements.statement: EU customer data must remain in EU storage and compute regions.
requirements.source_quote: EU customer data must remain in EU storage and compute regions.

requirements.statement: Backups must run every day.
requirements.source_quote: Backups must run every day.

requirements.statement: Backups must support point-in-time recovery with fifteen minute recovery point objective.
requirements.source_quote: Backups must support point-in-time recovery with fifteen minute recovery point objective.

requirements.statement: Customer documents must be encrypted at rest.
requirements.source_quote: Customer documents must be encrypted at rest.

requirements.statement: Customer document encryption keys must rotate every ninety days.
requirements.source_quote: Customer document encryption keys must rotate every ninety days.

requirements.statement: Admins must receive a Monday account activity digest email.
requirements.source_quote: Admins must receive a Monday account activity digest email.

requirements.statement: The digest must summarize new users, deleted users, failed logins, and billing changes.
requirements.source_quote: The digest must summarize new users, deleted users, failed logins, and billing changes.

requirements.statement: Customers need an in-app support ticket widget.
requirements.source_quote: Customers need an in-app support ticket widget.

requirements.statement: Support tickets must attach current page URL and account id automatically.
requirements.source_quote: Support tickets must attach current page URL and account id automatically.

requirements.statement: Workspace-level feature flags must be editable by internal operators only.
requirements.source_quote: Workspace-level feature flags must be editable by internal operators only.

requirements.statement: Internal operators need deployment status visibility.
requirements.source_quote: Internal operators need deployment status visibility.

requirements.statement: Deployment status must show version, environment, region, and last deploy time.
requirements.source_quote: Deployment status must show version, environment, region, and last deploy time.

requirements.statement: The mobile layout must support billing summary pages.
requirements.source_quote: The mobile layout must support billing summary pages.

requirements.statement: The mobile layout must support the usage dashboard.
requirements.source_quote: The mobile layout must support the usage dashboard.

requirements.statement: Mobile pages must preserve the same permission model as desktop.
requirements.source_quote: Mobile pages must preserve the same permission model as desktop.

requirements.statement: The system must provide dark mode for the admin console.
requirements.source_quote: The system must provide dark mode for the admin console.

requirements.statement: Admin console pages must meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements.
requirements.source_quote: Admin console pages must meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements.

requirements.statement: All interactive controls must be keyboard accessible.
requirements.source_quote: All interactive controls must be keyboard accessible.

requirements.statement: The product must include live chat support inside the portal.
requirements.source_quote: The product must include live chat support inside the portal.

requirements.statement: Customers must be able to configure custom domains for the portal.
requirements.source_quote: Customers must be able to configure custom domains for the portal.

requirements.statement: Custom domains must support automatic TLS certificate provisioning.
requirements.source_quote: Custom domains must support automatic TLS certificate provisioning.

requirements.statement: Customers must export all account data as a ZIP archive.
requirements.source_quote: Customers must export all account data as a ZIP archive.

requirements.statement: The export archive must include users, roles, audit logs, invoices, and support tickets.
requirements.source_quote: The export archive must include users, roles, audit logs, invoices, and support tickets.

requirements.statement: Admins must configure webhook endpoints for account events.
requirements.source_quote: Admins must configure webhook endpoints for account events.

requirements.statement: Webhook delivery must sign payloads with an HMAC secret.
requirements.source_quote: Webhook delivery must sign payloads with an HMAC secret.

requirements.statement: Failed webhook deliveries must retry with exponential backoff.
requirements.source_quote: Failed webhook deliveries must retry with exponential backoff.

requirements.statement: The portal must support SCIM user provisioning.
requirements.source_quote: The portal must support SCIM user provisioning.

requirements.statement: SCIM provisioning must support create, update, deactivate, and group assignment events.
requirements.source_quote: SCIM provisioning must support create, update, deactivate, and group assignment events.

solutions.what: SAML SSO is implemented for administrator accounts using the authentication service.
solutions.source_quote: SAML SSO is implemented for administrator accounts using the authentication service.

solutions.what: Certificate validation is implemented for uploaded SAML metadata.
solutions.source_quote: Certificate validation is implemented for uploaded SAML metadata.

solutions.what: Bulk user invitation through CSV upload is implemented with async workers.
solutions.source_quote: Bulk user invitation through CSV upload is implemented with async workers.

solutions.source_quote: The CSV invite worker supports ten thousand rows per file.

solutions.source_quote: Payment method expiration alerts are implemented for thirty days, seven days, and one day before expiration.

solutions.what: Self-service role management is partially implemented for standard and billing roles.

solutions.source_quote: In-app support ticket widget is implemented.

solutions.source_quote: Account ZIP export is partially implemented for users, roles, and invoices.

solutions.source_quote: Webhook endpoint configuration is implemented for account events.

gaps.requirement_statement: CSV import errors should show row number, field name, and a human readable message.
evidence: Closest solution SOL-0005 scored 0.33: Human readable CSV error messages are deferred to a later usability sprint.
gaps.recommendation: Confirm ownership and add an engineering solution that explicitly covers this requirement.

gaps.requirement_statement: Administrator audit logs must be retained for seven years.
evidence: Closest solution SOL-0001 scored 0.17: SAML SSO is implemented for administrator accounts using the authentication service.
gaps.recommendation: Confirm ownership and add an engineering solution that explicitly covers this requirement.
